title: Task synchronization from task-graph.md to collab state
purpose: Synchronizes task definitions from blueprint documents into collab state, building execution batches and managing task dependencies.
module_context: Exports interfaces for task graph structure and functions for parsing, building batches, detecting cycles, and syncing tasks from documents to session state.

steps.content: Extract the YAML content block from the document.
IF no YAML block is found, throw an error indicating missing content.
Initialize an array to collect parsed tasks and a temporary task object.
Process each line of the YAML content to build task definitions.
Identify new task entries by lines starting with '- id:' and store previous task.
Parse task fields like files, tests, description, parallel, and depends-on from YAML lines.
Ensure the final task is added to the collection after processing all lines.
Return the parsed task graph containing all extracted tasks.
Detect any circular dependencies in the task graph.
IF a cycle is detected, throw an error with the cycle details.
Perform topological sorting of tasks to determine execution order.
Convert the sorted waves into batch structures with status and dependencies.
Return the array of execution batches.
Initialize data structures to track task relationships and in-degrees.
Build adjacency list and count in-degrees for each task based on dependencies.
Iteratively process tasks with zero in-degrees to form execution waves.
Update in-degrees of dependent tasks after processing each wave.
Continue until all tasks are processed into waves.
Return the array of task waves representing the topological order.
Initialize tracking sets for visiting and visited nodes and a path array.
For each task, perform a depth-first search to detect cycles.
IF a cycle is found during DFS, return the cycle path.
ELSE return null indicating no cycles detected.
Initialize an array to collect YAML lines.
Add the tasks header to the YAML content.
For each task, add its properties to the YAML lines.
Return the complete YAML string.
Initialize an array to collect Mermaid diagram lines.
Add graph definition and node definitions for each task.
Add edges between tasks based on their dependencies.
Apply styles to nodes based on their execution wave.
Return the complete Mermaid diagram string.
Construct and return the path to the documents directory for a session.
Attempt to access the file at the specified path.
IF access succeeds, return true indicating the file exists.
ELSE return false indicating the file does not exist.

methods.name: createConsolidatedTaskGraph
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, tasks: TaskGraphTask[]): Promise<void>

steps.content: Build execution batches from the provided tasks.
Generate YAML content for the task graph.
Generate Mermaid diagram content for task dependencies.
Create a summary of execution waves.
Construct the complete markdown document with summary, YAML, Mermaid, and task details.
Write the consolidated task graph document to the appropriate location.
Initialize an empty array to collect all tasks.
Determine the path to the documents directory for the session.
Initialize metadata manager to identify active blueprint documents.
Find all blueprint documents that are not deprecated.
Read each active blueprint document and extract tasks.
IF tasks are found, create a consolidated task graph document.
IF no tasks are found, throw an error indicating no active blueprints.
Build execution batches from all collected tasks.
Load the current session state to preserve completed tasks.
Calculate pending tasks as the difference between all tasks and completed tasks.
Update the session state with the new batches and pending tasks.
Return the built execution batches.
